title: Law and the Marines Close In
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is law and the marines close in.
scene: The scene focuses on law and the marines close in, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm a little taken aback myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This place must have a rear exit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And the water's up there with it...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What the heck is going on?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Aghhh!! This guy is no joke!!

summary: Law and the Marines Close In. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
